generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and grandma, I've always believed in keeping our country safe. But have you noticed how the push for 'strategic autonomy' is making us more vulnerable? Our allies are stepping up, but we're isolating ourselves. Remember when local emergency services were delayed because of supply chain issues? Imagine if that happened during a real crisis. We need balanced partnerships, not reckless independence. #CommonSenseSecurity #StrongerTogether
